name: BB: IPS Detection: ICMP Echo Reply
notes: This rule is to exclude ICMP Echo reply from the IPS detection alert
bb_references: BB: IPS Detection: ICMP Echo Reply on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the Event Payload contains ICMP Echo Reply
TD_list: APPLY BB: IPS Detection: ICMP Echo Reply on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when the Event Payload contains ICMP Echo Reply
